name: Income Certificate
description: An official document certifying the annual income of an individual or family, used for subsidies and scholarships.
application_steps: Visit the State's e-District portal or local CSC/Tehsildar office.
Fill out the Income Certificate application form.
Attach salary slips, ITR, or an income affidavit.
Submit the application and pay the nominal fee.
A Patwari or local officer may conduct a verification inquiry.
Download the digitally signed certificate from the portal.

required_documents.name: Income Proof
required_documents.purpose: To establish the total family income.
required_documents.where_to_get: Salary Slips, ITR, or Court Affidavit

required_documents.name: Identity & Address Proof
required_documents.purpose: To verify identity and state residence.

common_mistakes: Failing to declare income from all sources (e.g., agriculture + business).
Using expired documents or un-notarized affidavits.
Applying in a state where the applicant does not hold permanent residence.
